Motivation

Modifications

Checklist

 Format your code according to the Contributor Guide.
 Add unit tests as outlined in the Contributor Guide.
 Update documentation as needed, including docstrings or example tutorials.

vllm.title: [Feature] Add load generation config from model
vllm.author: liuyanyi
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Desc
Add generation_config to engine_arg, allow load and overwrite the default sampling param.
To avoid braking change, this flag is defaults to None, preserving the existing behavior unless explicitly configured.
Here are the three mode of generation_config

None: keep the same behavior in previous

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Cleanup Pixtral HF code
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR fixes incorrect max image tokens for Pixtral HF, and also cleans up unused code that are already integrated into the merged multi-modal processor.

vllm.title: [Model] Add JambaForSequenceClassification model
vllm.author: yecohn
vllm.bodyExcerpt: [Model] Add support for embedding model JambaClassfication](#10858)

vllm.title: [V1] Fix multimodal profiling for `Molmo`
vllm.author: ywang96
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Molmo is a special case where the input processing also handles the preprocessing of multimodal data, therefore the dummy data for this model is defined as MultiModalKwags without a PIL.Image.
This PR adds a temporary workaround to fix this issue as well as renaming some functions to indicate their

vllm.title: [Model] Refactor Qwen2-VL to use merged multimodal processor
vllm.author: Isotr0py

vllm.title: [Misc] Clean up and consolidate LRUCache
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt: LRUDictCache and LRUCache are fundamentally the same, so I merged them together. I also improved the existing type annotations to be more precise.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix broken CPU compressed-tensors test
vllm.author: Isotr0py
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Fix broken CPU compressed-tensors test due to sparse_cutlass_supported: https://buildkite.com/vllm/ci/builds/10916#0193deb9-61bc-4abe-b98b-dd544b3a7fdd/6-1653

vllm.title: [Misc] Remove unused vllm/block.py
vllm.author: Ghjk94522
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Since this file is no longer referenced, it can be removed from the project.

vllm.title: [CI] Adding CPU docker pipeline
vllm.author: zhouyuan
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This patch adds the pipeline for CPU docker image. On each release(tag) it will build push the image to vllm/vllm-cpu
Fixes: #4771

vllm.title: [Bugfix][Hardware][POWERPC] Fix auto dtype failure in case of POWER10
vllm.author: Akashcodes732
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
FIX #11327
This PR fixes the dtype="auto" failure in case of POWEPC.
The failure observed in above issue was due to FP16 not supported in ppc64le architecture. With this PR we are making changes to select BF16 instead of FP16 when "auto" type is selected.

vllm.title: [ci][gh200] dockerfile clean up
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt: built upon #11302 , check it out with another branch in the upstream repo so that we can test it before merging.

INFO 12-19 22:58:27 model_runner.py:1415] Capturing cudagraphs for decoding. This may lead to unexpected consequences if the model is not static. To run the model in eager mode, set 'enforc

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix spec decoding when seed is none in a batch
vllm.author: wallashss
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The issue was in the rejection_sampler in a custom _multinomial function. When a batch contains a seed as None, the calculation fails because the access with non-spec indices does not change in place. So, I changed to every request to be calculated the same way as seeded using ranges.

Concise scrip
